text.title: Agile and Hybrid Approaches Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observable signals (preconditions, evidence access, named consumer) onto a concrete verdict; every leaf references a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Do all Applies-If preconditions hold AND no Skip-If disqualifier fires?

branch.question: Is the source-of-truth for inputs accessible AND can every non-trivial field be anchored?
Is the named human reviewer (operator / lead / founder) defined AND in the loop?

conclusion.verdict: apply the methodology; produce the artefact and route to reviewer for approval
halt; designate a named human reviewer before continuing
downgrade to draft; flag missing-evidence rows verify-before-commit
skip; methodology overhead does not pay back

example.trace: acme-platform-rebuild — 2 P + 3 H -> Hybrid; Water-Scrum-Fall partitioned into Discovery (A) / Build (A) / Deploy (P); ADR-2026-014 owner Iryna V.

text.example: preconditions=true AND evidence_per_field=true AND named_reviewer=true → apply, produce the artefact, route to reviewer.
